mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT U.USER_NO AS userNo, O.ORGAN_NAME AS organName, U.USER_ID AS userId, O.ORGAN_CERT_NUM AS organCertNum FROM TBL_USER U JOIN TBL_ORGAN O ON U.ORGAN_NO = O.ORGAN_NO WHERE U.USER_TYPE = 2 -- 기업회원 AND U.USER_STATUS = 2 -- 승인 대기 ORDER BY U.USER_NO DESC ) subquery ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USER U WHERE U.USER_TYPE = 2 AND U.USER_STATUS = 2

SELECT U.USER_NO AS userNo, U.ORGAN_NO AS organNo, O.ORGAN_NAME AS organName, U.USER_NAME AS userName, U.USER_BIRTH AS userBirth, O.ORGAN_CERT_NUM AS organCertNum, U.USER_EMAIL AS userEmail, U.USER_ADDRESS AS userAddress, U.USER_ADDRESS_DETAIL AS userAddressDetail, OC.ORGAN_FILE_SYSTEM_NAME AS organFileSystemName, OC.ORGAN_FILE_ORIGINAL_NAME AS organFileOriginalName FROM TBL_USER U JOIN TBL_ORGAN O ON U.ORGAN_NO = O.ORGAN_NO LEFT JOIN TBL_ORGAN_CERT OC ON U.USER_NO = OC.USER_NO WHERE U.USER_NO = #{value}
